reviews.review_msg: Took through distance ed. the tutor marker was easy going...the course it self is dry
Took through distance ed. the tutor marker was easy going...the course it self is dry
Took through distance ed. the tutor marker was easy going...the course it self is dry
Easy course with a great prof, why not??

Sandie is a real gem of all the courses present there. She is a pretty kind-hearted and generous soul ie. looks and takes care of her students pretty well. In general, FNST201 is more of a writing course and a very easy course too. Sandie makes it very easy for her students to get an A or A+. If you follow the guidelines given by her. DO YOUR BEST
she is my favorite professor. she is caring, helpful professor among all other. i love this course and her as well. she has made the 200 level course easy and interesting to study.
She is the kindest prof ever, Please be nice to her. IF you have any problems just let her know about it she will help you. Very encouraging.

She is just amazing. Always ready to talk to you and discuss your papers. If you need some more time for your assignment(s) just talk to her, and she will let you submit later. She is clear with her expectations, so you can easily get an A or even A+ if you follow the instructions.

I took her class at FIC. She helped me so much to do well in this course. I got 100% almost in all assignments. Just listen carefully to what she needs from you and follow the instructions, and you'll get 100%. Her lectures kind of useless, but you still have to attend because participation and attendance worth 20%. Good luck!

Deanna's a very charismatic prof, and the material she provides in her class is very valuable, but what she wants out of students can seem a bit scattered at times. Don't take the syllabus as gospel; things might change, and it can be confusing.
She was excellent! Very organized and invested in the course and her students. Went out of her way to make sure students understood assignments and expectations.

Deanna is a very compassionate professor. Class was sometimes boring and she stutters a lot but she had cool activities throughout the semester which really help us learn. At first I thought the textbooks sucked, but both of them are amazing! I wouldn't mind taking another class with Deanna again. :)

Deanna is a bright, friendly, and very involved professor. She cares about her students and is extremely helpful. I was extremely shocked by the ratings of all the ENGL101 students who were so concerned about race. I loved this prof, taking another course with her just because she's great.
really great teacher lots of enthusiasm

The best prof I've had so far. Very understanding, very enthusiastic about the material, and very helpful with her studetns. I fully enjoyed this course and would definitely take another class with her!

Maddie is a real gem of a prof. She is caring and so respectful that STUDENT'S HAVE LIVES OUTSIDE OF CLASS! She does give a lot of work and there are readings to do, but honestly, it's not that bad because of how awesome she is. I learned so much in class and 100% recommend her if you want a strict but fun prof.

Maddie was useless, she would hand back assignments after another one was due so you could not use the feedback to improve. Also she takes forever to mark. She is a tough marker. This class felt like a chore to go to. I would not take another class with her again. I swapped another class for this one,biggest mistake ever.
This class was interesting however, the prof was such a hard marker! She also was not helpful and is very condescending and rude. Dont take this class ever with this prof!
